title: sMusic
description: Playing music in Minecraft with Texture Pack has never been easier
body:
# 🎵 sMusic  

Add and play **custom songs** inside Minecraft easily using `.ogg` files and **automatic resource pack generation**.  

**sMusic** automatically creates a **custom resource pack** with all your `.ogg` tracks and lets you play them for players through commands.  

---

## How to use

- Music files must be **`.ogg` format**, placed in `plugins/sMusic/music/`.

- Each file becomes a playable sound that can be accessed using commands.  

- The resource pack automatically updates whenever new songs are added or configurations are changed.  

---

## 📝 Commands  

- `/music play <song> [player/@a/@p]` → Plays a song for a specific player or all online players.  
  *Example:* `/music play lobby_theme @a`  

- `/music stop [player/@a/@p]` → Stops all currently playing music for the specified players.  
  *Example:* `/music stop`  

---

# Important *every change to the song files after reloading you must update the texture pack for it to work correctly*

---
